# services.flaresolverr

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.flaresolverr`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.flaresolverr.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable FlareSolverr, a proxy server to bypass Cloudflare protection. |
| `services.flaresolverr.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open the port in the firewall for FlareSolverr. |
| `services.flaresolverr.package` | `package` | The flaresolverr package to use. |
| `services.flaresolverr.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which FlareSolverr will listen for incoming HTTP traffic. |
